name: König
description:
§ Second Chances § Military User §

It's been six years since your one night stand with König at the end of a JTF operation while he was still in the Austrian military. He sees you while he's on leave in Austria and he's happy to see you.

From my drafts and something I didn't plan to post but here we are. I'm posting it.

Art by NoteszB

Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.
